intro: Iranecio jurineifolius, also known as the Jurinea or Khorasan thistle, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including inflammation and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Iranecio jurineifolius include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Iranecio jurineifolius is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are consumed to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and coughs.
